canonical_definition: A benchmark from the ZeroSpeech challenge that objectively measures a model's language capability by testing its ability to score a real word higher than a phonetically similar non-word.
papers: A Variational Framework for Improving Naturalness in Generative Spoken Language Models
Long-Form Speech Generation with Spoken Language Models
